creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kirk McKusick from comment #13)
> (In reply to Glen Barber from comment #10)
> If there is an easy way to create 10Gb images in addition to the 30Gb images
> for the folks that want to use 10Gb images on the cloud, then that would be
> my first choice.
> 

Because of how the upload works, in particular the naming convention, "family name", and other metadata, this not particularly easy.  But regardless, we are too far into a current release cycle for changes with which I am not comfortable making at this point of the cycle.

> Otherwise, I would be in favor of having you reduce the 30Gb image size to
> 27Gb as that should still give us several years of growth. And hopefully by
> the time growth is needed, the size of the "free" VMs will also have
> increased.

I'll do some testing to see what the VMSIZE value should be to end up with a 30GB image.  I should have something committed to head today, after which I'll send re@ an request for approval to merge to stable/12 and stable/11.
